title: fritillaria lusitanica var. stenophylla
intro: Fritillaria lusitanica var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved Lusitanian fritillaria, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Fritillaria lusitanica var. stenophylla include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory infections, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain tumor cells. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal extract, or dried and used in tea or soup, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
